name: syntaur
description: Run Syntaur project and assignment workflows from Codex, including claiming work, planning, completing handoffs, session tracking, and write-boundary enforcement.

interface.shortDescription: Project and assignment workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Syntaur to create projects and assignments, claim work, keep plan and handoff records current, track Codex sessions, and enforce Syntaur write boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Claim a Syntaur assignment and set up this workspace
Write a Syntaur handoff and transition the assignment
